fragments.title: The Last Coronation of Verdana
fragments.author: Archivist Prime Seladine
fragments.summary: Complete memory record of the final coronation ceremony of King Aldric of Verdana, held 3 days before the battle.

fragments.title: Mira Chen's First Journal Entry
fragments.author: Mira Chen (self-authored)
fragments.summary: Mira Chen's earliest recorded memory — a childhood entry describing her first encounter with a Void fragment. Severely corrupted.

fragments.title: Battle Formation Records
fragments.author: Field Archivist Doran
fragments.summary: Tactical diagrams and troop memory logs from the three decisive engagements of the Great War, including the final charge at the Void Gate.

fragments.title: Architecture of the Void Gates
fragments.author: Unknown — possibly Core-generated
fragments.summary: Schematic memory of the original Void Gate construction. Nearly destroyed. Recovery could explain current Core resonance events.

fragments.title: The Forgetting Plague — Patient Zero
fragments.author: Healer Syndra Vex
fragments.summary: The first documented case of the Forgetting Plague. Healer Vex's meticulous records survived despite the erasure of all surrounding memories.

fragments.title: Council Decision — Final Session
fragments.author: Council Secretary Plenn
fragments.summary: The minutes of the last Council session before the Cartographers' Rebellion. The deciding vote was recorded but the voter's identity has been partially erased.

fragments.title: Star Chart of the Remembered Sky
fragments.author: Astronomer Calla Fenn
fragments.summary: Comprehensive star charts woven directly into the Memory Loom during the Song of Remembered Stars era. Each star corresponds to a living memory.

fragments.title: Voice of the Lost Northern Keeper
fragments.author: Keeper Aldric
fragments.summary: The last audio memory record of Keeper Aldric before the Northern Archive collapse. Contains locations of three hidden fragment caches.

fragments.title: Treaty of Dual Sovereignty — Original Text
fragments.author: Chancellor Renn
fragments.summary: The original signed text of the Dual Sovereignty Treaty. The highest-integrity fragment in the archive.

fragments.title: Memory Market Ledger — Cycle 14
fragments.author: Trader Fen of the South Markets
fragments.summary: Detailed ledger of fragment transactions during the fourteenth market cycle. Provides evidence of systematic integrity degradation through commodification.

fragments.title: The Quiet Circle's Restoration Manual
fragments.author: Archivist Pell (on behalf of The Quiet Circle)
fragments.summary: The Quiet Circle's step-by-step guide for fragment restoration under adverse void conditions. Still the most referenced restoration text.

fragments.title: Founding Charter of Ω-7
fragments.author: Founder Ilara Dawn
fragments.summary: The original founding charter of the Last Forgotten City, Ω-7, including the terms of the Loom's role as city guardian.

fragments.title: Signal From the Future — Transmission Log
fragments.author: Unknown — future timestamp
fragments.summary: A partial transmission received from a future datestamp. Contains coordinates and what appears to be an emergency archival override code.

fragments.title: Void Warden Patrol Logs — Week 44
fragments.author: Warden-Prime Selva
fragments.summary: Weekly patrol logs from Sector 6's Void Warden division. Documents the accelerating boundary erosion during the Northern Archive collapse.

fragments.title: Song Lyric Archive — Harmony Era
fragments.author: Star-Singer Oryn (curated collection)
fragments.summary: Complete lyrics and melodic memory-patterns from the Harmony Era. Singing them reportedly stabilises nearby fragment integrity.

fragments.title: Cartographers' Map — The Drawn Lands
fragments.author: Lena Map-Caller
fragments.summary: The famous map that sparked the Cartographers' Rebellion — depicting redrawn lands that officially do not exist according to Archivist Order records.

fragments.title: Archivist Oath — Original Recitation
fragments.author: First Archivist Ren
fragments.summary: The original Archivist Oath as spoken by First Archivist Ren at the founding of Ω-7. Still recited verbatim at all induction ceremonies.

fragments.title: Void Surge Event Data — Year 144
fragments.author: Core Sensor Array — automated
fragments.summary: Automated sensor readouts from the Year 144 Void Surge. Contains predictive models for subsequent surge events that were never acted upon.

fragments.title: Chen Family Genealogy Record
fragments.author: Elder Voss — reconstructed
fragments.summary: Attempted reconstruction of the Chen family lineage. Multiple conflicting records make definitive ancestry impossible to establish.

fragments.title: The Last Broadcast — City Radio Log
fragments.author: City Radio Station Ω — last operator unknown
fragments.summary: The final radio broadcast from what appears to be an alternate-future version of the Last City. Mostly static, but a voice can be heard reciting coordinates.
